meta.comparisonNote: WTD and 28-day vs prior year — update weekly; YTD column uses 2026 YTD vs 2025 same-period where noted
meta.ytdNote: YTD through February 2026 vs same period 2025 for CompStat table comparisons

districts.description: Counts by JCPD district (North, East, South, West); includes JC IMPACT district breakdown fields (burglary subtypes, theft of auto parts, robbery w/ weapon, stabbings) where published.

trends.description: YTD 2026 vs 2025 (same period through February), citywide key trends

rows.note: Counts only; percent change not provided
Increase vs prior year same period

trends.analysisNote: Citywide tracking is below 2025 across most categories through February. Burglary down sharply YTD; robbery down. Theft of auto parts and drug arrests are down vs same period 2025. Shoplifting is up — the main IMPACT-adjacent increase. South shows elevated theft YTD; West leads gun recoveries citywide. See JC IMPACT Monthly Tracker for full district context.

baseline2025.description: 2025 citywide monthly baselines (12 months) for charting and YoY context

weeklyImpact.sourceNote: Official JCPD CompStat week ranges from JC IMPACT Weekly Breakdown (not equal calendar segments).
